name: PainThermometer Watch Pain Follow-up
description: Review Apple Watch pain-trigger sessions, recompute pain and stress scores from recent vitals, and conduct a conversational Geriatric Pain Measure follow-up.
examples: Show me my patients with PainThermometer sessions.
Summarize the latest pain incident for this patient.
Recompute pain for the current session.
Continue the GPM follow-up for the active pain incident.
